nasb.text: Of Zebulun he said, “Rejoice, Zebulun, in your going forth, And, Issachar, in your tents.

esv.text: And of Zebulun he said, “Rejoice, Zebulun, in your going out, and Issachar, in your tents.

cnv.text: 論到西布倫，他說： “西布倫啊，你出外的時候，要喜樂； 以薩迦啊，你在帳棚裡的時候，也要喜樂。

ccb.text: 摩西祝福西布伦和以萨迦支派说： “愿西布伦人欣然外出， 愿以萨迦人在帐篷中欢喜。
